description_long: This is a single-story modern bungalow with a flat roof, featuring a spacious open-plan layout and large windows that allow ample natural light. The front yard includes a paved driveway with two parked cars, a manicured lawn, and a pathway leading to the main entrance. The rear section of the property boasts a private backyard with a patio area, outdoor seating, and a prominent tree providing shade. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, complemented by glass doors and windows framed in white. The property is enclosed by a low fence with greenery along the sides, enhancing privacy and curb appeal. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, functional outdoor spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, a front driveway, and a landscaped backyard with a patio and tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two cars, main entrance, and manicured front lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, side windows, and the backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, patio, outdoor seating, and a large tree.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side lawn, fence, and the rear section of the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
